title: Senior Software Engineer - Patni Computer Systems - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Patni Computer Systems - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Patni Computer Systems. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Patni Computer Systems:
Patni Computer Systems is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems!
